message.text: Welcome to the Achilles server! /help shows you what’s available.
Server restarts every 7 hours. Watch for countdowns.
No cheating. No exploiting. Report issues via /report or Discord.
This is Achilles. /help has your survival quick-guide. Report issues via /report or Discord.
Monitor radio frequency 87.8 MHz for special alerts.
Each time you spawn, you can get a different themed loadout. Experience them all!
